info.title: dotnet-parseidon
info.description: Command-line tool for the Parseidon parser generator.

options.name: --override
options.description: How to handle if the output file already exists [default: ask]

commands.name: parser
commands.description: Create parser class for the grammar as a C# class

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Override the namespace for the generated parser

options.name: --class-name
options.description: Override the class name for the generated parser

arguments.name: GRAMMAR-FILE
arguments.description: The grammar file to be used

commands.name: ast
commands.description: Create an AST for a code file using a parser generated from the grammar

arguments.name: GRAMMAR-FILE
arguments.description: The grammar file to be used

arguments.name: CODE-FILE
arguments.description: The input file to parse into an AST

commands.name: textmate
commands.description: Create a TextMate grammar from the provided grammar definition

arguments.name: GRAMMAR-FILE
arguments.description: The grammar file to be used

commands.name: vscode
commands.description: Create a VS Code extension with the syntax highlighting from the provided grammar definition

options.name: --version
options.description: Override the version number in package.json

options.name: --package-json-override
options.description: JSON file to merge into package.json; overrides on conflicts

arguments.name: GRAMMAR-FILE
arguments.description: The grammar file to be used
